detail:
Hatchery dispatch for /smithy.cut specs/2026-05-21-005-spawn-output-extraction 3 failed and was escalated.

Error:
Spawn 20260603-726cd5 exited 1; manager prompt was not sent. Logs: /home/jmbattista/.march/logs/hatchery-spawns/20260603-726cd5/spawn-output.log

The loop auto-recovered this 2 times and it still failed, so the slice is now operator-only. A 'branch already exists' / diverged-branch collision needs legate.unwedge + a Brood teardown of the orphan branch/worktree (#155) before re-dispatch; otherwise run legate.error for worker-side recovery.
